use_cases: Displaying individual email messages in an inbox view
Showing sender information with avatar fallback in email clients
Building email thread or conversation lists
ai_summary: A minimalist email client card component featuring Avatar primitives for sender display with image and fallback states. Built with Radix UI Avatar components and Tailwind CSS for clean, flat styling. Ideal for SaaS applications, fintech platforms, or any business communication tool requiring inbox-style email message previews with sender avatars.
